coach_notes: To build a strong technology career, focus on learning Python and React first, as they are widely used in modern development and data roles. Start with free online tutorials like Codecademy or freeCodeCamp for Python, and build small projects like a to-do app to practice React. Also, improve communication and documentation by contributing to open-source projects or writing technical blog posts, which will make you a more well-rounded candidate.
